welcome.title: Welcome - {{ app_name }}
welcome.subject: Welcome to {{ app_name }}!
welcome.heading: Welcome, {{ name }}!
welcome.thank_you: Thank you for joining {{ app_name }}. We're excited to have you on board!
welcome.account_created: Your account has been successfully created with the email: {{ email }}
welcome.start_using: You can now start using all the features available to you.
welcome.questions: If you have any questions, feel free to reach out to our support team.

email_verification.title: Verify your email - {{ app_name }}
email_verification.subject: Verify your email address - {{ app_name }}
email_verification.heading: Verify your email
email_verification.thanks: Thanks for registering with {{ app_name }}! Before you can start using all features, we need to confirm that this email address belongs to you.
email_verification.copy_link: If the button does not work, copy and paste this link into your browser:
email_verification.expires: This link is valid for the next {{ expires_hours }} hours.
email_verification.ignore: If you did not create an account, you can ignore this email.

password_reset.title: Password Reset - {{ app_name }}
password_reset.subject: Password Reset Request - {{ app_name }}
password_reset.heading: Password Reset Request
password_reset.received: We received a request to reset your password for the account associated with {{ email }}.
password_reset.click_button: Click the button below to reset your password:
password_reset.copy_link: Or copy and paste this link into your browser:
password_reset.expires_in: This link will expire in {{ expires_hours }} hour(s)
password_reset.didnt_request: If you didn't request this password reset, please ignore this email
password_reset.unchanged: Your password will remain unchanged if you don't click the link
password_reset.concerns: If you have any concerns about your account security, please contact support immediately.

password_changed.title: Password Changed - {{ app_name }}
password_changed.subject: Password Changed - {{ app_name }}
password_changed.heading: Password Changed Successfully
password_changed.success: Your password has been successfully changed.
password_changed.didnt_make_change: If you did not make this change, please:
password_changed.contact_support: Contact support if you suspect unauthorized access

account_deleted.title: Account Deleted - {{ app_name }}
account_deleted.subject: Account Deleted - {{ app_name }}
account_deleted.heading: Account Deletion Confirmation
account_deleted.success: Your account has been successfully deleted.
account_deleted.sorry: We're sorry to see you go. Your account and all associated data have been removed from our system in accordance with your request.
account_deleted.questions: If you have any questions or if this was done in error, please contact our support team as soon as possible.
account_deleted.didnt_request: If you did not request this deletion, please contact support immediately.

common.footer_automated: This is an automated email. Please do not reply to this message.
